data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 06fd4d94). Three core settings now resolve through the typed Config with canonical REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY> override + old-name deprecation alias (warning) + config-file path. (1) COMPACT_THRESHOLD->REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD (compact.threshold): compact.py reads load_config().compact.threshold; --threshold= flag still overrides; ConfigError propagates (explicit command = loud). (2) SCRATCH_BASE_DIR->REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR (scratch.base_dir): scratch.base_dir() + reads._load_scratch() read load_config().scratch.base_dir, fail-safe to default path on malformed config (best-effort infra; reads passes explicit root to avoid git subprocess). (3) REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC (mcp.allow_jira_sync): new mcp_server._allow_jira_sync() reads load_config().mcp.allow_jira_sync, fail-SAFE off on ConfigError/garbage (preserves old _env_truthy gate semantics: bad value->off, never fail open); gate message + docstrings updated. Aliases added to config._LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES; old names added to _env_signature (cache invalidation). ACs met: each renamed canonical + old aliased with warning; precedence preserved (CLI>env>file>default; canonical-wins over alias); MCP gate fail-safe default-off unchanged. Tests (8 new): canonical/alias/canonical-wins/config-file for compact + scratch consumer + mcp gate (default off, alias enables, garbage fail-safe); existing test_mcp.py still green via the alias. Full offline suite green: 1939 passed, 9 skipped. Subagent review: clean, NO critical/major (2 minor non-blocking notes: mcp gate config-file path is cwd-sensitive [intended], test resets are belt-and-suspenders). Verify gate untouched. Parent 15f6 still blocked by EV-3b (TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR) + EV-3c (reconciler/LLM + id-guard flip).
